title: Creaking Plus
description: Creaking Plus adds exciting new Creaking variants to enhance gameplay.
body:
![Creaking_title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e26d097214730b8071f7d93038b400d64e4385f.png)

![Thumbnail](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d399aee7aa6c48b52c6285a278432ea594d9455.jpeg)

**Creaking Plus adds exciting new Creaking variants to enhance gameplay.**

![Accacia](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c103debdfbdb285f12d265ebef896a1a5595d190.png)
![Birch](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bac516ecc92540f2d4d173b36fd04930fefa5a21.png)
![oak](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/73c6ac79fb624e1396e4336bf768abbf5dbf8007.png)
![DarkOak](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/29042bc4ea608d47d42d0e2364cf9ba2fe7d2837.png)

Creaking Plus is a simple but exciting mod that adds brand new Creaking variants into Minecraft. Instead of running into the same old mobs over and over again, now you’ll find fresh versions of Creakings that feel unique and make the world a little more mysterious.

Each variant has its own personality and design, keeping the vanilla vibe of Minecraft while adding more depth to the game. Some might be creepier, some might be stronger, and a few might just catch you off guard when you least expect it. 

This mod is lightweight and made to work smoothly alongside other mods, so you don’t have to worry about big changes breaking your game. Whether you love building, exploring caves, or just testing your skills in survival mode, these new Creakings add extra tension and excitement to the journey.
